Assessment Date: Mai 12, 2026 Scope: 9 Sections · 33 Configuration Areas Generated by M365 Assess

Identity

User accounts, MFA enrollment, admin roles, conditional access policies, and password policies. Identity is the primary attack surface — these controls determine who can access your environment and how they authenticate. Compromised credentials remain the leading cause of data breaches; strong identity controls (MFA, least-privilege roles, conditional access) are the single most effective defense. See Microsoft Entra identity security guidance.

Entra Security Config (60 rows)
Status:
Category Setting Current Value Recommended Value Status Check Id Remediation
Application Consent Third-party Integrated Apps Restricted Allowed Restricted Fail ENTRA-APPS-001.1 Entra admin center > Users > User settings > Users can register applications > No. Also review Enterprise applications > User settings > Users can consent to apps.
Application Consent User Consent for Applications ManagePermissionGrantsForSelf.microsoft-user-default-recommended; ManagePermissionGrantsForSelf.microsoft-user-default-allow-consent-apps; ManagePermissionGrantsForOwnedResource.microsoft-dynamical... Do not allow user consent Fail ENTRA-CONSENT-001.1 Run: Update-MgPolicyAuthorizationPolicy -DefaultUserRolePermissions @{PermissionGrantPoliciesAssigned = @()}. Entra admin center > Enterprise applications > Consent and permissions.
Application Consent Users Can Register Applications True False Fail ENTRA-APPREG-001.1 Run: Update-MgPolicyAuthorizationPolicy -DefaultUserRolePermissions @{AllowedToCreateApps = $false}. Entra admin center > Users > User settings.
Authentication Methods Email OTP Authentication enabled disabled Fail ENTRA-AUTHMETHOD-002.1 Entra admin center > Protection > Authentication methods > Email OTP > Disable. Email OTP is a weaker authentication factor.
Authentication Methods SMS Authentication enabled disabled Fail ENTRA-AUTHMETHOD-001.1 Entra admin center > Protection > Authentication methods > SMS > Disable. SMS is vulnerable to SIM-swapping attacks.
Authentication Methods System-Preferred MFA not configured enabled Fail ENTRA-AUTHMETHOD-004.1 Entra admin center > Protection > Authentication methods > Settings > System-preferred multifactor authentication > Enabled.
Device Management Azure AD Join Restriction All users allowed Restricted to specific users/groups Fail ENTRA-DEVICE-001.1 Entra admin center > Devices > Device settings > Users may join devices to Microsoft Entra > Selected. Restrict to a specific group of authorized users.
Device Management Global Admins as Local Admin on Join Enabled Disabled Fail ENTRA-DEVICE-003.1 Entra admin center > Devices > Device settings > Global administrator is added as local administrator on the device during Azure AD Join > No.
Device Management Maximum Devices Per User 50 15 or fewer Fail ENTRA-DEVICE-002.1 Entra admin center > Devices > Device settings > Maximum number of devices per user. Set to 15 or lower.
Directory Settings LinkedIn Account Connections Enabled Disabled Fail ENTRA-LINKEDIN-001.1 Entra admin center > Users > User settings > LinkedIn account connections > No. Prevents data leakage between LinkedIn and organizational directory.
External Collaboration Dynamic Group for Guest Users No dynamic guest group found At least 1 dynamic group for guests Fail ENTRA-GROUP-002.1 Entra admin center > Groups > New group > Membership type = Dynamic User > Rule: (user.userType -eq "Guest"). This enables targeted policies for guest users.
Password Management Password Expiration: office365.information-worker.pro days Never expires (with MFA) Fail ENTRA-PASSWORD-001.14 Run: Update-MgDomain -DomainId {domain} -PasswordValidityPeriodInDays 2147483647. M365 admin center > Settings > Password expiration policy.
Password Management Password Expiration: sip.myoffice365.in days Never expires (with MFA) Fail ENTRA-PASSWORD-001.12 Run: Update-MgDomain -DomainId {domain} -PasswordValidityPeriodInDays 2147483647. M365 admin center > Settings > Password expiration policy.
Password Management Password Expiration: www.demo-corp.de days Never expires (with MFA) Fail ENTRA-PASSWORD-001.11 Run: Update-MgDomain -DomainId {domain} -PasswordValidityPeriodInDays 2147483647. M365 admin center > Settings > Password expiration policy.
Password Management Password Expiration: www.myoffice365.in days Never expires (with MFA) Fail ENTRA-PASSWORD-001.13 Run: Update-MgDomain -DomainId {domain} -PasswordValidityPeriodInDays 2147483647. M365 admin center > Settings > Password expiration policy.
Password Management SSPR Registration Campaign Targets All Users Disabled Enabled for all users Fail ENTRA-SSPR-001.1 Entra admin center > Protection > Authentication methods > Registration campaign > Enable and target All Users.
Security Defaults Security Defaults Enabled False True (if no Conditional Access) Fail ENTRA-SECDEFAULT-001.1 Run: Update-MgPolicyIdentitySecurityDefaultsEnforcementPolicy -IsEnabled $true. Entra admin center > Properties > Manage security defaults.
Admin Accounts Admin License Footprint 1 GA with productivity license: Michael Kirst-Neshva Admins use minimal license (Entra P2 only) Warning ENTRA-CLOUDADMIN-002.1 Assign admin accounts minimal licenses (Entra ID P2). Do not assign E3/E5 productivity suites. M365 admin center > Users > Active users > Licenses.
Admin Accounts Global Administrator Count 5 2-4 Warning ENTRA-ADMIN-001.1 Run: Get-MgDirectoryRole -Filter "displayName eq 'Global Administrator'" | Get-MgDirectoryRoleMember. Maintain 2-4 global admins using dedicated accounts (break-glass accounts are exclude...
Directory Settings Users Can Create Security Groups True False Warning ENTRA-GROUP-001.1 Run: Update-MgPolicyAuthorizationPolicy -DefaultUserRolePermissions @{AllowedToCreateSecurityGroups = $false}. Entra admin center > Groups > General.
External Collaboration Guest User Access Restriction Limited access (default) Restricted access Warning ENTRA-GUEST-001.1 Run: Update-MgPolicyAuthorizationPolicy -GuestUserRoleId '2af84b1e-32c8-42b7-82bc-daa82404023b'. Entra admin center > External Identities > External collaboration settings.
Password Management Auth Method Registration Campaign default enabled Warning ENTRA-MFA-001.1 Run: Update-MgBetaPolicyAuthenticationMethodPolicy with RegistrationEnforcement settings. Entra admin center > Protection > Authentication methods > Registration campaign.
Access Control Entra Admin Center Restricted Property not available True Review ENTRA-ADMIN-002.1 Entra admin center > Identity > Users > User settings > Administration center > verify "Restrict access to Microsoft Entra admin center" is set to Yes.
Admin Accounts Emergency Access Accounts 0 detected (heuristic: name contains break glass/emergency) 2+ enabled break-glass accounts Review ENTRA-ADMIN-003.1 Create 2+ cloud-only emergency access accounts with Global Administrator role, excluded from all Conditional Access policies. Use naming convention including "BreakGlass" or "Emergen...
Authentication Methods Per-user MFA (Legacy) Could not query -- verify manually All per-user MFA disabled (use CA policies) Review ENTRA-PERUSER-001.1 Entra admin center > Users > Per-user MFA > Ensure all users show Disabled. Use Conditional Access policies for MFA enforcement instead.
Device Management BitLocker Recovery Key Restriction Review -- verify users cannot read own BitLocker keys Users restricted from recovering BitLocker keys Review ENTRA-DEVICE-006.1 Entra admin center > Devices > Device settings > Restrict users from recovering the BitLocker key(s) for their owned devices > Yes.
External Collaboration Guest Invitation Policy All members can invite Admins and guest inviters only Review ENTRA-GUEST-002.1 Run: Update-MgPolicyAuthorizationPolicy -AllowInvitesFrom 'adminsAndGuestInviters'. Entra admin center > External Identities > External collaboration settings.
Organization Settings Forms Internal Phishing Protection Cannot be checked via API Enabled Review ENTRA-ORGSETTING-002.1 M365 admin center > Settings > Org settings > Microsoft Forms > ensure internal phishing protection is enabled.
Organization Settings Shared Bookings Pages Restricted Cannot be checked via API Restricted to selected users Review ENTRA-ORGSETTING-004.1 M365 admin center > Settings > Org settings > Bookings > restrict shared booking pages to selected staff members.
Organization Settings Third-Party Storage in M365 Web Apps Cannot be checked via API Restricted (all third-party storage disabled) Review ENTRA-ORGSETTING-003.1 M365 admin center > Settings > Org settings > Microsoft 365 on the web > uncheck all third-party storage services.
Password Management Password Protection On-Premises Password Rule Settings not available True Review ENTRA-PASSWORD-005.1 Entra admin center > Protection > Authentication methods > Password protection. Verify on-premises password protection is enabled.
Privileged Identity Management Access Reviews for Guest Users PIM is available but not configured in this tenant At least 1 access review for guests Review ENTRA-PIM-002.1 This check requires Entra ID P2 (included in M365 E5). Entra admin center > Identity Governance > Access reviews.
Privileged Identity Management Access Reviews for Privileged Roles PIM is available but not configured in this tenant At least 1 access review for admin roles Review ENTRA-PIM-003.1 This check requires Entra ID P2 (included in M365 E5). Entra admin center > Identity Governance > Access reviews.
Privileged Identity Management GA Activation Requires Approval PIM is available but not configured in this tenant Yes Review ENTRA-PIM-004.1 This check requires Entra ID P2 (included in M365 E5). Entra admin center > Identity Governance > PIM > Azure AD roles > Settings.
Privileged Identity Management PIM Manages Privileged Roles PIM is available but not configured in this tenant PIM enabled for all privileged roles Review ENTRA-PIM-001.1 This check requires Entra ID P2 (included in M365 E5). Enable PIM at Entra admin center > Identity Governance > Privileged Identity Management.
Privileged Identity Management PRA Activation Requires Approval PIM is available but not configured in this tenant Yes Review ENTRA-PIM-005.1 This check requires Entra ID P2 (included in M365 E5). Entra admin center > Identity Governance > PIM > Azure AD roles > Settings.
Security Defaults Security Defaults Enabled Unable to retrieve True (if no CA) Review ENTRA-SECDEFAULT-001.2 Run: Update-MgPolicyIdentitySecurityDefaultsEnforcementPolicy -IsEnabled $true. Entra admin center > Properties > Manage security defaults.
Admin Accounts Cloud-Only Global Admins All 5 GA accounts are cloud-only All admin accounts cloud-only Pass ENTRA-CLOUDADMIN-001.1 No action needed.
Application Consent Admin Consent Workflow Enabled True True Pass ENTRA-CONSENT-002.1 Run: Update-MgPolicyAdminConsentRequestPolicy -IsEnabled $true. Entra admin center > Enterprise applications > Admin consent requests.
Authentication Methods Voice Call Authentication disabled disabled Pass ENTRA-AUTHMETHOD-001.2 Entra admin center > Protection > Authentication methods > Voice call > Disable. Voice is vulnerable to telephony-based attacks.
Conditional Access Enabled CA Policies 10 1+ Pass ENTRA-CA-003.1 Run: Get-MgIdentityConditionalAccessPolicy | Where-Object {$_.State -eq 'enabled'}. Ensure policies are set to On, not Report-only.
Device Management Local Admin Assignment on Entra Join Additional local admins configured: 0 Minimal local admin assignment Pass ENTRA-DEVICE-004.1 Entra admin center > Devices > Device settings > Manage Additional local administrators on all Azure AD joined devices. Minimize additional local admins.
Device Management Local Administrator Password Solution (LAPS) Enabled Enabled Pass ENTRA-DEVICE-005.1 Entra admin center > Devices > Device settings > Enable Microsoft Entra Local Administrator Password Solution (LAPS) > Yes.
Directory Settings Non-Admin Tenant Creation Restricted False False Pass ENTRA-TENANT-001.1 Run: Update-MgPolicyAuthorizationPolicy -DefaultUserRolePermissions @{AllowedToCreateTenants = $false}. Entra admin center > Users > User settings.
External Collaboration Guest Invitation Domain Restrictions Restricted (invites: adminsGuestInvitersAndAllMembers) Restricted to allowed domains only Pass ENTRA-GUEST-004.1 Entra admin center > External Identities > External collaboration settings > Collaboration restrictions > Allow invitations only to the specified domains.
Organization Settings User Consent for Applications Restricted Do not allow user consent Pass ENTRA-ORGSETTING-001.1 Entra admin center > Enterprise applications > Consent and permissions > User consent settings > Do not allow user consent.

CA Policy Evaluation (8 rows)
Status:
Category Setting Current Value Recommended Value Status Check Id Remediation
Conditional Access Device Code Flow Blocked No matching CA policy found At least 1 policy Fail CA-DEVICECODE-001.1 Create a CA policy: Target All users > Conditions > Authentication flows > Device code flow > Grant > Block access. Entra admin center > Protection > Conditional Access.
Conditional Access Managed Device for Security Info Registration No matching CA policy found At least 1 policy Fail CA-DEVICE-002.1 Create a CA policy: User actions > Register security information > Grant > Require compliant device. Entra admin center > Protection > Conditional Access.
Conditional Access Phishing-Resistant MFA for Admins No matching CA policy found At least 1 policy Fail CA-PHISHRES-001.1 Create a CA policy: Target admin roles > Grant > Require authentication strength > Phishing-resistant MFA. Entra admin center > Protection > Conditional Access.
Conditional Access User Risk Policy Configured No matching CA policy found At least 1 policy Fail CA-USERRISK-001.1 Create a CA policy: Target All users > Conditions > User risk > High > Grant > Require password change + MFA. Entra admin center > Protection > Conditional Access.
Conditional Access Legacy Authentication Blocked Yes (2 policy: Sperren von Legacy Apps; M365 Lighthouse - Block Legacy Authentication) At least 1 policy Pass CA-LEGACYAUTH-001.1 No action needed.
Conditional Access MFA Required for Admin Roles Yes (2 policy: Baseline - Require MFA for Admins; Microsoft-managed: Multifactor authentication for admins accessing Microsoft Admin Portals) At least 1 policy Pass CA-MFA-ADMIN-001.1 No action needed.
Conditional Access Sign-in Risk Blocks Medium+High Yes (1 policy: Microsoft-managed: Multifactor authentication and reauthentication for risky sign-ins) At least 1 policy Pass CA-SIGNINRISK-002.1 No action needed.
Conditional Access Sign-in Risk Policy Configured Yes (1 policy: Microsoft-managed: Multifactor authentication and reauthentication for risky sign-ins) At least 1 policy Pass CA-SIGNINRISK-001.1 No action needed.

Hybrid

On-premises Active Directory synchronization and hybrid identity configuration. Hybrid sync health directly impacts authentication reliability and determines which identities are managed in the cloud vs. on-premises.

Licensing

Microsoft 365 license allocation and utilization. Understanding license distribution helps identify unused spend and ensures users have the entitlements needed for security features like Defender and Intune.

Email

Mailbox infrastructure, Exchange Online security configuration, email protection policies, mail flow, and DNS-based email authentication. Email remains the #1 attack vector — over 90% of cyberattacks begin with a phishing email, and business email compromise (BEC) accounts for billions in losses annually.

Mailbox Summary 0 Not connected to Exchange Online. Run Connect-Service -Service ExchangeOnline first.
EXO Security Config 1
Email Security 0 Not connected to Exchange Online. Run Connect-Service -Service ExchangeOnline first.
Mail Flow 0 Not connected to Exchange Online. Run Connect-Service -Service ExchangeOnline first.
DNS Authentication 0 The term 'Get-AcceptedDomain' is not recognized as a name of a cmdlet, function, script file, or executable program. Check the spelling of the name, or if a path was included, verify that the path is correct and try again.
DNS Security Config 0 Cannot index into a null array.

Review1

Category Setting Current Value Recommended Value Status Check Id Remediation
Mail Flow Inbound Connectors - Unauthenticated Relay Get-InboundConnector not available No open relay connectors Review EXO-DIRECTSEND-001.1 Connect to Exchange Online PowerShell to check inbound connector configuration.

Intune

Device enrollment, compliance policies, and configuration profiles. Intune controls ensure corporate devices meet security baselines and that non-compliant devices are restricted from accessing company data.

Device Summary 4
Compliance Policies 4
Config Profiles 14

Device Enrollment Personal Device Enrollment Blocked Insufficient permissions or license (Intune required) Block personal device enrollment Review INTUNE-ENROLL-001.1 This check requires Intune license and DeviceManagementConfiguration.Read.All permission.

Security

Microsoft Secure Score, Defender for Office 365 policies, and Data Loss Prevention rules. These controls provide defense-in-depth against malware, ransomware, and accidental data leakage. Defender policies should be configured at Standard or Strict preset levels as defined in the Microsoft recommended security settings. DLP rules prevent sensitive data (PII, financial records, health information) from leaving the organization via email, chat, or file sharing.

Secure Score 1
Defender Policies 0 Not connected to Exchange Online. Run Connect-Service -Service ExchangeOnline first.
Defender Security Config 6
DLP Policies 0 Not connected to Purview (Security & Compliance). Run Connect-Service -Service Purview first.
Compliance Security Config 3
Purview Retention Config 1

Category Setting Current Value Recommended Value Status Check Id Remediation
Priority Accounts Preset Security Policies Configured Get-EOPProtectionPolicyRule not available Strict or Standard preset policy Review DEFENDER-PRIORITY-001.1 Connect to Exchange Online PowerShell to check preset security policy rules.
Priority Accounts Strict Preset Covers Priority Users Get-EOPProtectionPolicyRule not available Strict preset targets priority accounts Review DEFENDER-PRIORITY-002.1 Connect to Exchange Online PowerShell to check preset security policy rules.
Safe Attachments Safe Attachments Availability Not licensed Defender for Office 365 P1+ Review DEFENDER-SAFEATTACH-001.1 Safe Attachments requires Defender for Office 365 Plan 1 or higher.

Safe Links Safe Links Availability Not licensed Defender for Office 365 P1+ Review DEFENDER-SAFELINKS-001.1 Safe Links requires Defender for Office 365 Plan 1 or higher.
Zero-Hour Auto Purge ZAP for Teams Not licensed (Defender for Office 365 required) Defender for Office 365 with Teams ZAP Review DEFENDER-ZAP-001.1 ZAP for Teams requires Defender for Office 365. Upgrade license to enable this capability.

Purview Retention Config (1 rows)
Status:
Category Setting Current Value Recommended Value Status Check Id Remediation
Retention Policies Retention Policies Configured Cmdlet not available At least 1 enabled Review PURVIEW-RETENTION-001.1 Connect to Security & Compliance PowerShell to check retention policies: Connect-Service -Service Purview.

Collaboration

SharePoint, OneDrive, and Microsoft Teams configuration and access settings. Collaboration tools are where sensitive data lives — these controls govern sharing, guest access, and external communication. Misconfigured sharing settings are a common source of data exposure; anonymous sharing links and unrestricted guest access should be reviewed carefully. See Microsoft secure collaboration guidance.

SharePoint & OneDrive 0 Access denied (403). Ensure the app or user has the SharePointTenantSettings.Read.All permission and admin consent has been granted.
SharePoint Security Config 0 SharePoint settings access denied. Ensure 'SharePointTenantSettings.Read.All' is consented. Add this scope when connecting to Graph.
Teams Access 1

Category Setting Current Value Recommended Value Status Check Id Remediation
Teams Apps Third-Party App Permission Policies Cannot be fully checked via API Block third-party apps or restrict to approved list Review TEAMS-APPS-002.1 Teams admin center > Teams apps > Permission policies > Org-wide app settings > Third-party apps > Off (or restrict to approved apps).
Teams Settings Report a Security Concern Enabled Cannot be checked via API Enabled in messaging policies Review TEAMS-REPORTING-001.1 Teams admin center > Messaging policies > Global (Org-wide default) > Report a security concern > On.
Teams Settings Teams Workload Active Active Active Info TEAMS-INFO-001.1 Informational — confirms Teams service connectivity.

Informational Notice

This compliance assessment is provided for informational purposes only and does not constitute a comprehensive security assessment, audit, or certification. Results reflect automated checks at a point in time and should not be considered conclusive. For a thorough security evaluation, consider engaging a qualified security professional.
